utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. The format asks for flight details with costs; the cost is present, but details are insufficiently specific – Not fully specified. 4) accommodation: type, name, details (5 nights), and cost provided – OK. 5) activities: selected activities with costs listed – OK. 6) additional_services: extra service with cost – OK. 7) total_budget: single figure provided, but the format asks for a complete cost breakdown; only a total is given without breakdown summing components – Not fully specified as a breakdown. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services = 5. Transportation and total_budget are not fully specified.
